title: PC - Profile Customizer
description: Allows the customization of the profile page by adding additional features not present in the core, including tracking of point changes.

title: BCG - Bulk Content Generator
description: Allows admins to generate large amounts of content on their sites simply by uploading files (.xls, .xlsx, .ods, among other file formats).

title: JABP - Just A Bump Plugin
description: Allows users to bump questions sending them to the top of the _All activity_ section.

title: UR - User Reactions
description: Allows users to react to questions, answers and comments.

title: DM - Dynamic Mentions
description: Allows users to be mentioned using the `@user` syntax.

title: AS - Advanced Search
description: Extends the way in which Q2A searches for posts and allows the user to get better results when searching.

title: TUB - Temporary User Block
description: Allows users to be blocked for a period of time and then be automatically unblocked.

title: SNP - Social Network Profiles
description: Allows users to add information about social networks they are part of and share it with the community.

title: RA - Random Avatar
description: Assigns new users a random avatar from a given set immediately after registering.

title: MTL - Maximum Tag Length
description: Limits the amount of characters allowed per each question tag.

title: FC - Fake Cron
description: Fires events after a certain amount of requests or in a time-based manner (daily, weekly, monthly).
